name: Bond to Stay Jeopardy Assessment Collection

eligibility.description: Available to taxpayers subject to assessments under sections 6851, 6852, 6861, or 6862 who can provide a bond in the amount of the stayed collection.

actionability.retroactive_note: Action required during tax year — verify if still applicable

description: Taxpayers can halt the immediate collection of a jeopardy or termination assessment by filing a bond with the IRS for the amount they wish to stay.
